name: ARC (SEA, 1985)
notes: The BBS-era original. Auto-selects its best method per file (no dial). No directory support: archives the canonical tar. ARC's fixed argv buffer requires short archive names, so create writes a short name (moved into place) and extract copies to a local name first. Distinct from FreeArc (2007).
extract_cmd: cp {archive} a.arc && arc x a.arc > /dev/null && rm -f a.arc
